events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess LOTO residential job, observed field condition: energy source missed (stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor). Work rough-complete. Reference OSHA 1910.147. Determine compliance. Since missed stored energy source, LOTO incomplete, non-compliant, dangerous. decision fail. risk high or critical? Stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor can cause serious injury/death. In residential maybe critical? Need choose. OSHA requires all energy sources isolated, including stored energy relieved, restrained, or dissipated. Missing stored energy is non-compliance. component_conditions: installed-defective? non-compliant. Maybe both. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 70? value not asked 0. confidence 1.0. event_time 0. rate 0. order empty. workable empty. findings: stored energy source not identified/isolated; failure to dissipate/residual energy; incomplete LOTO procedure. actions: identify all energy sources; relieve/restrain/dissipate stored energy; verify zero energy state; retrain worker; update LOTO procedure. rationale. references: OSHA 1910.147(c)(4), (d), (f). Need exact JSON shape. Ensure no prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Stored energy source (hydraulic, gravity, and/or capacitor) was not identified or controlled during lockout/tagout.",
    "Residual/stored energy was not relieved, restrained, or dissipated before work was performed.",
    "Lockout/tagout procedure is incomplete and does not achieve a zero-energy state."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work and re-secure all energy sources.",
    "Identify every energy source, including stored/residual hydraulic, gravitational, and capacitor energy.",
    "Relieve, restrain, or dissipate all stored energy and verify a zero-energy state before proceeding.",
    "Update the job-specific lockout/tagout procedure and retrain personnel on stored energy control."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires all energy sources to be isolated and all stored or residual energy to be relieved, restrained, or dissipated before servicing or maintenance. Missing a stored hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor energy source means the system is not at zero energy and the lockout/tagout is non-compliant, creating a critical hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4) energy control procedure",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d) machine or equipment shutdown and isolation",
    "OSHA 1910.147(f) release from lockout or tagout"
  ]
}
